query:
SELECT 'fei' as tipo, sellerId, s.name, points, status FROM fei_records fr JOIN sellers s ON fr.sellerId = s.id WHERE status = 'approved' AND sellerId IN (3, 4)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'consignacao' as tipo, sellerId, s.name, points, status FROM consignment_records cr JOIN sellers s ON cr.sellerId = s.id WHERE status = 'approved' AND sellerId IN (3, 4)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'despachante' as tipo, sellerId, s.name, points, status FROM dispatch_records dr JOIN sellers s ON dr.sellerId = s.id WHERE status = 'approved' AND sellerId IN (3, 4);
